name: dev-planner
description: When Product-Spec.md is complete and needs to be planned into development phases
intent: Transform a validated Spec into an actionable phased DEV-PLAN with task breakdown, dependency ordering, and effort estimates — bridges requirements into execution
author: ReqForge

when: Spec has changed and plan needs updating

commands.name: dev-planner
commands.description: Generate or update DEV-PLAN.md with phased development plan
